title: HiddenOres
description: Stone, Deepslate, and Netherrack now drop ores!
body:
**HiddenOres is a lightweight datapack that adds a chance for ores to drop when mining stone, deepslate or netherrack.**

**When mining blocks like Stone in the Overworld or Netherrack in the Nether, there is a very small chance that ores will drop. This makes mining feel more rewarding while keeping vanilla gameplay mostly unchanged.**

### Features: 
####  • Mining stone/deepslate in the Overworld has a chance to drop overworld ores.
#### • Mining netherrack in the Nether has a chance to drop nether ores.
####  • Very low drop chances so ores remain rare.
####  • Works with normal tools and enchantments.

### Slight inspiration from:
[![BeyondEnchant Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f92ba3ae0a2ebac31c7ed2db55f4e4ba4c01c5dd.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/beyondenchant)

### Why use this datapack?
  HiddenOres adds a small layer of randomness and reward to mining without changing world 
  generation. Even when mining for just Stone, Deepslate or Netherrack, there is always a chance to find something 
  valuable.

### Compatibility: 
  This datapack only modifies block loot tables. It should work with most datapacks unless 
  they also modify the same loot tables.

### Problems?
  Contact me on discord on my server.

### Installation (Datapack):
####  Download the datapack.
####  Place it in the world's datapacks folder.
####  Run /reload or restart the world.
